chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-219 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.1490/2024. 30.05.2024 Petitioner present in person Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, AAG ***************** Learned AAG has filed compliance report submitting that case of the petitioner for performa promotion has been considered and has been declined by Provincial Selection Board-II in its meetings dated 29.02.2024, 04.03.2024 and 08.03.2024. Listed application is accordingly disposed of. Petitioner may avail the remedy against such order in accordance with law, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
